heading: Acceptance of promotions; oath of office
label: 20240 Acceptance of promotions; oath of office

children.heading: .—Acceptance
children.label: a .—Acceptance
children.text: An officer who is appointed to a higher grade under is considered to have accepted the appointment on the date on which the appointment is made unless the officer expressly declines the appointment.section 20239 of this title

children.heading: .—Oath
children.label: b .—Oath
children.text: An officer who has served continuously since taking the oath of office prescribed in is not required to take a new oath upon appointment to a higher grade under .section 3331 of title 5section 20239 of this title
